overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in a black coat and hat walking through a historic Southern residential district at night. The character traverses wet cobblestone streets lined with Victorian mansions and Spanish moss-draped trees, eventually entering a gated property and approaching a grand mansion with Greek Revival architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path approaching historic residential street

events.description: character turns from garden path onto cobblestone street
moving into area with more prominent street lamp illumination

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along garden path and turns onto the cobblestone street, passing a wooden bench

entered.detail: weathered wooden park bench with metal armrests beside the path
large two-story mansion with tall white columns and wraparound porch
large oak trees draped with hanging Spanish moss
ornate black cast iron fence with stone pillars surrounding the property
ornate black street lamp casting warm yellow light onto the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a garden area with dense vegetation and Spanish moss-draped trees. The character walks past a wooden bench and approaches a grand Greek Revival mansion before turning onto a cobblestone street illuminated by Victorian street lamps.

events.description: character slows slightly while passing the mansion entrance

agents.ego_description: character walks along the wet cobblestone street passing grand mansions with lit windows

entered.detail: red brick building with multiple windows glowing with warm interior light
large stone pillars marking the entrance to a gated property

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone street lined with historic mansions. The wet stones reflect the warm glow of Victorian street lamps. A brick townhouse with lit windows appears on the left while ornate stone gate pillars mark property entrances on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with iron fenced properties

events.description: approaching the open wrought iron gate of the target mansion

agents.ego_description: character continues down the street alongside iron fences and landscaped gardens, heading toward an open gate

entered.detail: open wrought iron gate leading to mansion grounds with decorative scrollwork
smaller auxiliary building with green doors and warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the street, the character approaches an open wrought iron gate. A carriage house with green doors is visible on the left side of the property. The street remains empty and quiet, with the mansion's portico becoming visible through the gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion front garden and entrance approach

events.description: character passes through the wrought iron gate onto the mansion property
character slows while approaching the mansion entrance steps

agents.ego_description: character walks through the gate and approaches the grand mansion entrance with tall columns, moving up the brick pathway

entered.detail: grand entrance with tall white columns supporting a second-floor balcony
large potted palm trees flanking the entrance steps
landscaped beds with blooming red and white flowers
double doors with glass panels glowing with interior light

segments.scene_description: The character enters the gated property and walks up a brick pathway toward a grand Greek Revival mansion. Large potted palms flank the entrance steps, and flower beds line the path. The mansion's portico with tall columns dominates the view as the character approaches the glowing entrance doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion side garden path leading to rear

events.description: character turns left and moves along the side of the mansion away from the entrance
moving into narrower passage between main house and auxiliary building

agents.ego_description: character walks around the side of the mansion along a narrow brick path, moving toward the rear garden area

entered.detail: mansion exterior wall covered in dense climbing ivy and vines
wooden wheelbarrow sitting in the garden beside the path
two-story wooden building with shuttered windows adjacent to the main house

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and walks along a narrow brick path beside the mansion. The wall is covered in dense ivy, and a wooden garden cart sits nearby. The path leads toward a carriage house with green doors, moving into a more enclosed side garden area between the main house and auxiliary buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a lush, mossy garden through a historic residential street and back into the private grounds of a grand estate. It begins amidst dense vegetation and Spanish moss-draped trees, passing a wooden bench before the camera turns onto a wet cobblestone street illuminated by the warm glow of Victorian lamps. As the character moves past brick townhouses and ornate stone pillars, the scene opens toward a wrought iron gate that reveals a distant portico and a carriage house with green doors. The camera then follows the character through the gate and up a brick pathway lined with potted palms and flower beds, leading directly toward the towering columns of a Greek Revival mansion. Finally, the view shifts as the character turns left, moving away from the main entrance along an ivy-covered wall and a narrow path toward the enclosed side garden and carriage house.
